attributes.title: [WebSphere OTel] Overview
attributes.description: High-level view of WebSphere Application Server health covering servlet throughput, thread and connection pool saturation, JVM resource utilisation, and transaction health.

params.markdown:
## [WebSphere OTel] Overview

High-level health of WebSphere Application Server instances:
- Servlet request throughput and error rates
- Thread pool utilisation and hung thread detection
- Connection pool health and saturation
- JVM CPU and memory utilisation
- Transaction processing health

query.esql:
TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_requests_total))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_requests_total))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_errors_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_errors_total))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_errors_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_errors_total))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.pool == "WebContainer"
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.pool == "WebContainer"
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS hung = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS hung = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_concurrentHung_threads))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_transactionmanager_active_transactions IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_txn = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_transactionmanager_active_transactions))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_transactionmanager_active_transactions IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_txn = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_transactionmanager_active_transactions))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.process_cpu_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(metrics.process_cpu_utilization)

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.process_cpu_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(metrics.process_cpu_utilization)

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes))

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_requests_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.appname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_requests_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.appname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_errors_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_errors_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.appname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_errors_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_errors_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.appname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Thread Pool Active Threads Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.pool
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.pool
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_connectionpool_utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.jndiname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes)), mem_max = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_max_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes)), mem_max = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_max_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.process_cpu_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS process_cpu = AVG(metrics.process_cpu_utilization), system_cpu = AVG(metrics.system_cpu_utilization) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.process_cpu_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS process_cpu = AVG(metrics.process_cpu_utilization), system_cpu = AVG(metrics.system_cpu_utilization) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_requests_total)), error_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_errors_total)) BY attributes.appname, attributes.servlet
| EVAL error_pct = CASE(request_rate > 0, error_rate / request_rate, 0)
| SORT request_rate DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_requests_total)), error_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_errors_total)) BY attributes.appname, attributes.servlet
| EVAL error_pct = CASE(request_rate > 0, error_rate / request_rate, 0)
| SORT request_rate DESC
| LIMIT 20
